title: mentha × pratensis var. crispa
intro: Mentha × pratensis var. crispa, also known as curled mint or pineapple mint, is a variety of mint plant that is characterized by its unique curled or twisted leaves and pineapple-like fragrance. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × pratensis var. crispa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve respiratory health, and provide relief from headaches and other minor ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
